title: Enterprise Viewing Permissions (Third Option)
excerpt:

posts.author: techthings (Mischa)
posts.cookedHtml:
There are instances where the visibility of an item should be restricted exclusively to users in a people column, preventing even the item’s creator from viewing it. At the moment this is not an option.

For instance, if a client starts dealing with another employee in the company, it would be appropriate to block the original creator from accessing the client’s information on the main client board.
